creator: kenyon@kenyonralph.com
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

This seems to be a problem with ccache. I removed the ccache port and
disabled it in /etc/make.conf, and I get this:

===>  Building for gstreamer-plugins-taglib-0.10.16_1,3
  CC    gsttaglibmux.o
  CXX   gstid3v2mux.o
  CXX   gstapev2mux.o
  LINK  libgsttaglib.la
eval: /usr/local/libexec/ccache/world-c++: not found
gmake: *** [libgsttaglib.la] Error 127
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/gstreamer-plugins-taglib.

===>>> make failed for audio/gstreamer-plugins-taglib
===>>> Aborting update

I'm not sure where that ccache line is coming from now.

- -- 
Kenyon Ralph
